summary: Critical GitHub Actions requirement violations: (1) action refs not pinned to commit SHAs (task explicitly requires this; checkout@v4 must be pinned), (2) actionlint installed in workflow but never executed—violates explicit requirement to validate YAML with actionlint before act, (3) no act-result.txt file or act test output shown (required artifact per task), (4) no fixture files included, (5) magic number '17' in test expectations (run-act-tests.ts lines 40–46) is fragile and unmaintainable. TypeScript parsing logic is solid with good types/comments, but incomplete GitHub Actions integration and missing validation evidence are disqualifying. Workflow structure is sound apart from these gaps.
